case_title: DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY VS. DAN J BERTOLUCCI et al

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-09-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-19-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-09-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT BERTOLUCCI, DAN J DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR APR-09-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-09-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-25-2004

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERTOLUCCI, DAN J $6,995.45 PRINCIPAL, $509.73 ATTORNEY FEES, $587.52 INTEREST, $180.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,273.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ( NO ENVELOPE, PLACE IN THE PICK-UP BOX )
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY
